records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So in the end, you used the Senior Code and pulled the information he left behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So in the end, you used the Senior Code and pulled the information he left behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So in the end, you used the Senior Code and pulled the information he left behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Specifically about the worldwide Grand Dimension Crevice anomalies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Specifically about the worldwide Grand Dimension Crevice anomalies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Specifically about the worldwide Grand Dimension Crevice anomalies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the six branches' Grand Dimension Crevices expand for a set time,
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the six branches' Grand Dimension Crevices expand for a set time,
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the six branches' Grand Dimension Crevices expand for a set time,

records.m_Talk_ENG: the roots stretching out from them will suck up all the possibilities nearby they can reach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: the roots stretching out from them will suck up all the possibilities nearby they can reach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: the roots stretching out from them will suck up all the possibilities nearby they can reach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Odd. If a global Counterside Effect is imminent as you say...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Odd. If a global Counterside Effect is imminent as you say...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Odd. If a global Counterside Effect is imminent as you say...

records.m_Talk_ENG: why has it not been announced publicly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: why has it not been announced publicly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: why has it not been announced publicly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if time is tight, civilian casualties would drop noticeably.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if time is tight, civilian casualties would drop noticeably.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if time is tight, civilian casualties would drop noticeably.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I went public, the higher-ups would brand me a reactionary exploiting the Senior's absence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I went public, the higher-ups would brand me a reactionary exploiting the Senior's absence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I went public, the higher-ups would brand me a reactionary exploiting the Senior's absence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Proving that Mr. Jackson is the source would eat up who knows how much time, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Proving that Mr. Jackson is the source would eat up who knows how much time, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Proving that Mr. Jackson is the source would eat up who knows how much time, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is coming is framed as a trial to force the growth of a certain person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is coming is framed as a trial to force the growth of a certain person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is coming is framed as a trial to force the growth of a certain person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Try to twist causality to fight it, and you only speed up the world's ruin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Try to twist causality to fight it, and you only speed up the world's ruin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Try to twist causality to fight it, and you only speed up the world's ruin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And who is that certain person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And who is that certain person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And who is that certain person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But do we have a shot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But do we have a shot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But do we have a shot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, eyes on the screen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, eyes on the screen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, eyes on the screen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a big deal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a big deal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a big deal.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: T-two problems?
records.m_Talk_DEU: T-two problems?
records.m_Talk_FRA: T-two problems?

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's, uh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's, uh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's, uh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?
records.m_Talk_DEU: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?
records.m_Talk_FRA: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. We will cooperate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. We will cooperate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. We will cooperate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Awesome!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Awesome!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Awesome!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!

records.m_Talk_ENG: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will handle the side details en route.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will handle the side details en route.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will handle the side details en route.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why are you like this if you know that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why are you like this if you know that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why are you like this if you know that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is exactly what we need to find out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is exactly what we need to find out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is exactly what we need to find out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf. Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf. Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf. Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And where do we find that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And where do we find that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And where do we find that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox, where was it again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox, where was it again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox, where was it again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...! Right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...! Right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...! Right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's northeast of here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's northeast of here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's northeast of here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And who is that certain person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And who is that certain person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And who is that certain person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It said the Wolf, but there were no details, so I'm not sure...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-anyway, it means even if we throw everything at Chamber, the outcome is unknown.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Then it tracks with the flow we saw during the last Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, if a Hollow God or Demon Lord show up right now, we have bigger fish to fry than anything else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But do we have a shot?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But do we have a shot?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But do we have a shot?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Hollow God we fought back then, or even the Replacer, was too much for our strength alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then don't worry about that. There's a way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, eyes on the screen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, eyes on the screen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, eyes on the screen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Lotus Senior's handwriting. Looks like a schematic for some device.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher uses an Eternium Drive to alter the emergence coordinates of Shadows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With it, we can twist the spatial axes and slow the roots' advance as much as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I kinda swiped it when Senior Isolde was asleep
8g I mean, she shared it with me when we reached a friendly agreement!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Doesn't look like something you can just plop down and use.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a big deal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a big deal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a big deal.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You just need a little
8g I mean, a lot of Eternium to power it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, you're asking to borrow the States' assets to protect the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if I am to take you at your word, two problems remain for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: T-two problems?
root.m_Talk_DEU: T-two problems?
root.m_Talk_FRA: T-two problems?

root.m_Talk_ENG: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?
root.m_Talk_DEU: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?
root.m_Talk_FRA: First, how did Chamber's Senior know future events?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Second, once Eternium exceeds critical mass, its energy melts the dimension surface.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, I don't see anything in the blueprint that addresses that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maria is right. Forget the dimension surface, this output won't even be enough to stop Shadows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior Jackson, was it? Sounds like his prep was awfully sloppy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Jackson is not sloppy. And that issue can be solved properly!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's, uh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's, uh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's, uh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we borrow the power of the Northern Union, somehow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union? You mean the nation that's entirely an Anti-Administration Zone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, don't you get it? We're here because of the issue your side threw out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?
root.m_Talk_DEU: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?
root.m_Talk_FRA: End of the world or not, why are we borrowing power from an enemy faction?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. We will cooperate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. We will cooperate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. We will cooperate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Awesome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Awesome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Awesome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maria, did you hear me? That set-up screams suspicious!

root.m_Talk_ENG: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On one condition. We act on our own judgment to match the situation on the ground.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We will handle the side details en route.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We will handle the side details en route.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We will handle the side details en route.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got it! Thank you, Lieutenant General! You're awesome!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you out of your mind, Maria? What if it's a trap and you just said yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Sylvia has a point, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the earlier briefing is true, working with the Dark Council already put us in a political corner...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the States partner with the Northern Union, the shockwave through politics will be massive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agreed. Every operation built on uncertain intel turned into a slog.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then why are you like this if you know that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then why are you like this if you know that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then why are you like this if you know that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No lunatic on earth would bluff the States, much less the President.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if an Official Administration Counter showed her face and still tried to con us, that would be a pretty coherent scam.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this ties to the Northern Union, the claim that a Senior foresaw the future also tracks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are even rumors the Northern Union created artificial Counters with precognition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. Say what that Yanikka girl said is true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... Ever hear of a lie nested inside the truth?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What if this has nothing to do with the Chamber Administration and is a trap set by the Northern Union?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is exactly what we need to find out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is exactly what we need to find out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is exactly what we need to find out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Either way, we now have cause to enter the Northern Union's territory. That alone is not a losing play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ground Zero of the Northern Union territory will be mine and Jaina's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rest of you, move to Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice and prepare for the anomalies to come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That had me sweating. Thank goodness their commander is reasonable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't clap. Do you know how hard it is to explain when you only half know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And why am I, someone not even part of the Northern Union, explaining Felix's plan?

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-because I stutter a lot and I'm young.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rather than me speaking for the Northern Union, a-an Official Administration Counter like you is more convincing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox...! Thinks so too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, forget it. What's done is done, and yelling about the past changes nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, now we head for Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf. Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf. Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf. Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two barks, huh. What does that mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Explained everything and she still doesn't get it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Is your brain just for show?</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Is what Fluffox is saying!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you move. Keep it up and you lose both legs, not just one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: P-please don't bully Fluffox...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-and what it said wasn't wrong. We don't need to go to the Grand Dimension Crevice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Remember? If the Track Switcher runs on Eternium alone, the dimension surface melts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To prevent that, we need to bring something that suppresses Eternium's energy concentration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And where do we find that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And where do we find that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And where do we find that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox, where was it again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox, where was it again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox, where was it again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...! Right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...! Right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...! Right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's northeast of here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's northeast of here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's northeast of here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to go to <color=#ffd34c>Ciringrad</color>...!!
